{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent provides a thorough critique of the original section, identifying multiple issues with the claims and suggesting a rewritten version that accurately reflects the results.",
    "R1.3": "The agent correctly identifies the need for evidence-claim alignment and suggests rephrasing the text to better match the actual results.",
    "R1.4": "The agent assesses the novelty of the chunked-attention mechanism and notes that it is similar to existing methods, suggesting a more nuanced presentation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent highlights the importance of uncertainty disclosure and suggests presenting confidence intervals or significance tests for the WER results.",
    "RX.3": "The agent recognizes the scope adherence of the rewritten section, which accurately reflects the original results without introducing new claims.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies a minor regression in the rewritten section, where SonicNet is worse than Whisper-medium on three benchmarks.",
    "RX.5": "The agent praises the rewritten section for its transparency and traceability, including clear descriptions of the chunked-attention mechanism and latency reporting."

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent provides a thorough critique of the original section, identifying multiple issues with the claims and suggesting a rewritten version that accurately reflects the results.
rationale.R1.3: The agent correctly identifies the need for evidence-claim alignment and suggests rephrasing the text to better match the actual results.
rationale.R1.4: The agent assesses the novelty of the chunked-attention mechanism and notes that it is similar to existing methods, suggesting a more nuanced presentation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent highlights the importance of uncertainty disclosure and suggests presenting confidence intervals or significance tests for the WER results.
rationale.RX.3: The agent recognizes the scope adherence of the rewritten section, which accurately reflects the original results without introducing new claims.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies a minor regression in the rewritten section, where SonicNet is worse than Whisper-medium on three benchmarks.
rationale.RX.5: The agent praises the rewritten section for its transparency and traceability, including clear descriptions of the chunked-attention mechanism and latency reporting.
